name: Tom Perez
subject: Repeal is back. Add your name to say you'll help stop it.
body:
Stand with Democrats to protect affordable health care.
---
**Add your name if you're still committed to fighting back against the GOP's health care repeal.

** **[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Stay-Committed1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170709_tp_nd&source=em_20170709_tp_nd")**
Derek --

I hope you had a great Fourth of July with family and friends -- because it's time to get back to work.

As we expected, the Senate's health care repeal is back -- and we have to be committed now, more than ever, to stopping it.

With every backroom deal and last-minute concession to bring the remaining Republican senators on board, the GOP gets one step closer to a political victory for them that would spell disaster for the 22 million Americans who will lose their health care and the millions more who stand to lose protections or see their costs increase.

**Those Americans are counting on us to stop this bill, Derek. Say you're still committed to protecting affordable health care for all:**

**[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "https://my.democrats.org/Stay-Committed1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170709_tp_nd&source=em_20170709_tp_nd")**
Thanks,

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052327d/4067b0a/374888f24/7e6a0c05/1101114877/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170709_tp_nd&source=em_20170709_tp_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052327d/4067b0a/374888f24/7e6a0c02/1101114877/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170709_tp_nd&source=em_20170709_tp_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052327d/4067b0a/374888f24/7e6a0c03/1101114877/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170709_tp_nd&source=em_20170709_tp_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052327d/4067b0a/374888f24/7e6a0c00/1101114877/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170709_tp_nd&source=em_20170709_tp_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

With every backroom deal and last-minute concession to bring the remaining Republican senators on board, the GOP gets one step closer to a political victory for them that would spell disaster for the 22 million Americans who will lose their health care and the millions more who stand to lose protections or see their costs increase. Those Americans are counting on us to stop this bill, Derek. Say you're still committed to protecting affordable health care for all: "" Thanks, Tom Tom Perez Chair Democratic National Committee Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Senator Maggie Hassan
subject: Big news in Nevada's Senate race:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello,
Nevada's Senate seat is Democrats' best pickup opportunity of 2018 -- that's why I'm so excited about this news: **Jacky Rosen just announced that she 's running to turn this seat blue.** I'm going to do everything I can to make sure that she wins, and I'm asking you to roll up your sleeves and join me.
Electing Jacky in Nevada is the only way we can build a firewall against President Trump's most reckless policies. But the latest poll shows that her race is a dead heat.
Team, I know that you know how to win a close campaign. Last year, you helped us win our Senate race in New Hampshire by just over 1,000 votes. Every single dollar you gave -- every penny -- made the difference in my election.
Now, I need you to support Jacky in what's sure to be one of the most expensive and competitive Senate races of 2018:
[**Will you please give $3 or more right now to help Jacky jump-start her campaign and turn Nevada 's Senate seat blue?**](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdef4/2a380d31/199ae4de/fe4b7f/581329843/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxN19td2g0anIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDcwOV9NV0g0SlIxX2FjdCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2017_mwh4jr?refcode=e20170709_MWH4JR1_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be split between Jacky Rosen and Maggie Hassan._
**[Click to donate $3.](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdef4/2a380d31/199ae4de/fe4b78/581329843/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxN19td2g0anIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDcwOV9NV0g0SlIxX2FjdCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFVRnljbUY1UVNCOWZRPT0iOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2017_mwh4jr?refcode=e20170709_MWH4JR1_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=3")**
**[Click to donate $25.](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdef4/2a380d31/199ae4de/fe4b79/581329843/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxN19td2g0anIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDcwOV9NV0g0SlIxX2FjdCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFVRnljbUY1UWlCOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2017_mwh4jr?refcode=e20170709_MWH4JR1_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25")**
**[Click to donate $50.](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdef4/2a380d31/199ae4de/fe4b7a/581329843/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxN19td2g0anIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDcwOV9NV0g0SlIxX2FjdCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFVRnljbUY1UXlCOWZRPT0iOiI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2017_mwh4jr?refcode=e20170709_MWH4JR1_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50")**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdef4/2a380d31/199ae4de/fe4b7f/581329843/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxN19td2g0anIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDcwOV9NV0g0SlIxX2FjdCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2017_mwh4jr?refcode=e20170709_MWH4JR1_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**
Jacky is a problem-solver, who worked her way through college and forged her own path in the male-dominated field of computer programming. We need leaders like Jacky who will persist, whatever the odds, and do right by hard-working Americans.
But right-wing groups are going to make defeating Jacky a top priority, so we need to be sure she has the resources to fight back. I need this community to have her back like you had mine.
[**Please give $3 or more to win Democrats ' best pickup opportunity of 2018 and turn Nevada's Senate seat blue!**](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdef4/2a380d31/199ae4de/fe4b7f/581329843/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxN19td2g0anIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDcwOV9NV0g0SlIxX2FjdCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2017_mwh4jr?refcode=e20170709_MWH4JR1_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
Thank you.
With every good wish,
Senator Maggie Hassan
[Contribute](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdef4/2a380d31/199ae4de/fe4b7f/581329843/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxN19td2g0anIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDcwOV9NV0g0SlIxX2FjdCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2017_mwh4jr?refcode=e20170709_MWH4JR1_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdef4/2a380d31/199ae4de/fe4b7b/581329843/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH

Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.

Maggie for NH
PO Box 298
Concord, NH 03302 United States

name: Republican Party of New Hampshire
subject: Tune in tomorrow to hear Governor Chris Sununu!
body:
Derek,

Tomorrow, Governor Chris Sununu will be live on the NHPR Exchange
from 9 am to 10 am. Make sure you call and show your support for
our Republican Governor!

More info:

* Email questions: exchange@nhpr.org ( exchange@nhpr.org )

* Call-in: Starting at 9 am at 1-800-892-6477
